wins.event: Q4 revenue $7.7B record, +24% YoY; FY revenue $25.8B, +14% YoY; net income +26%
Data Center $3.9B record, +69% YoY; 2024 DC AI revenue exceeded $5B
Client revenue $2.3B record, +58% YoY; 4 consecutive quarters of share gains
MI350 series sampling Q1, production mid-year — accelerated from prior plan
ZT Systems acquisition approved in multiple jurisdictions; close on track for H1 2025

risks.event: Gaming revenue $563M, -59% YoY on semi-custom inventory drawdown (channel now normalized)
Embedded revenue $923M, -13% YoY; slower-than-expected market recovery; industrial/comm softness
MI300X cloud deployment heavily concentrated at Microsoft and Meta

guidance.notes: 2025 guidance: strong double-digit revenue and EPS growth YoY across all segments; DC AI franchise on path from $5B+ in 2024 to tens of billions over coming years.

_notes: Capstone year for AMD — established multibillion DC AI franchise. CEO confident, multi-year guidance bullish. Gaming/Embedded weakness persists but moderating.
